text: In the first moment, I feel a gentle curiosity: the quietness of this empty, modern space encourages introspection, almost as if I am waiting for an encounter or an idea to emerge from the silence. Entering the vibrant exhibition area, I experience a sense of creative possibility—the colors and words stimulate my intellect, inviting me to ponder the dance between human ingenuity and technological advancement. I feel simultaneously small and connected, an observer drawn to contemplate my place in this unfolding narrative of progress.
